segments.speaker: 题目17/18
segments.text: Listen to a conversation. Should we take the train or fly to the conference? The train is slower, but the train station is a quick walk from the conference hotel. The airport is at least half an hour away. Train it is. Then I hope the hotel has nice views of the city that I can't answer. Just be ready to leave at 7:00a.m.. 7:00. That's awfully early. Is that the only option I thought . we should take an early trains, so we have time to sightsee when we get there.
